title: Phase 3: AI + Data + Editors + External flake tools
description:
Create modules using external flake inputs and complex HM config (7 files):
- ai/claude.nix: claude-code from numtide/llm-agents.nix
- ai/copilot.nix: gh extension install shell hook for gh-copilot
- data/dolt.nix: dolt from nixpkgs
- data/beads.nix: beads from numtide/llm-agents.nix
- utils/opencode.nix: opencode from numtide/llm-agents.nix
- utils/afk.nix: afk from jorgengundersen/afk flake
- editors/neovim.nix: neovim + tree-sitter + HM programs.neovim (treesitter, LSPs: nil, gopls, rust-analyzer)
Verify: nix develop .#claude --command claude --version, nix develop .#neovim --command nvim --version
close_reason: All 7 modules created, verified with nix flake check and nix develop

title: Phase 2: Languages + Quality + Git + Utils
description:
Create nixpkgs-based aspect modules (8 files):
- languages/go.nix: go, gopls, golangci-lint (GOPATH, GOBIN env)
- languages/rust.nix: rustc, cargo, rustfmt, clippy, rust-analyzer
- languages/node.nix: nodejs (nix-managed, no fnm)
- languages/python.nix: python3, uv
- languages/bun.nix: bun
- quality/linters.nix: shellcheck, hadolint (linux-only via lib.optionals), mdformat, lefthook, bats
- git/config.nix: git, gh, delta + HM programs.git (delta, aliases, defaultBranch)
- utils/glow.nix: glow
Verify: nix develop .#go --command go version
close_reason: All 8 Phase 2 modules implemented and verified: languages (go, rust, node, python, bun), quality/linters, git/config, utils/glow

title: Phase 1: Core + Shell + Environments
description:
Create foundation modules (6 files):
- core.nix: base tools (git, gh, jq, yq, ripgrep, make, curl, wget, tree, unzip)
- shell/bash.nix: bash + HM programs.bash (aliases, completions)
- shell/prompt.nix: starship + HM programs.starship
- shell/fzf.nix: fzf + HM programs.fzf (keybindings)
- environments/minimal.nix: composes core + bash + prompt
- environments/default.nix: composes all devShells
Verify: nix develop .#minimal --command starship --version
close_reason: Completed: all 7 Phase 1 files created (core.nix, shell/bash.nix, shell/prompt.nix, shell/fzf.nix, environments/minimal.nix, environments/default.nix, home-modules.nix). nix flake check passes, starship verified in minimal shell.

title: Phase 0: Create flake.nix with all inputs
description: Create minimal flake.nix entry point. Inputs: nixpkgs-unstable, flake-parts, import-tree, home-manager, numtide/llm-agents.nix, jorgengundersen/afk. Systems: x86_64-linux, aarch64-linux, x86_64-darwin, aarch64-darwin. Delegates to flake-parts + import-tree. Commit flake.lock. Verify: nix flake check passes.
close_reason: Created flake.nix with all inputs and flake.lock

title: Implement Nix flake dev environments
description: Full implementation of composable, reproducible dev environments using Nix flakes, flake-parts, import-tree, and Home Manager following the dendritic pattern. See specs/spec.md for full architecture.
close_reason: All phases (0-5) complete. Nix flake dev environments fully implemented with composable modules, Home Manager, and documentation.

title: Disable default refresh in havn-session-prepare
description: Change environments/default so havn-session-prepare does not pass --refresh by default. Refresh should only be enabled when HAVN_HOME_MANAGER_REFRESH=1. Update related documentation to match the new opt-in behavior.

title: Add HAVN_HOME_MANAGER_REFRESH override
description: Make havn-session-prepare refresh nested Home Manager builds by default while allowing opt-out via HAVN_HOME_MANAGER_REFRESH, update default environment docs, and cut a release.

title: Clean Home Manager deprecation warnings
description: Address Home Manager warning noise in default environment by migrating renamed options and pinning changed defaults for neovim and git modules.

title: Align AI CLI homes to XDG paths
description: Set Home Manager session variables for Codex, Claude Code, Copilot CLI, and Pi so their config/state directories default under XDG locations; update release metadata and tagging.

title: Add tmux to default environment
description: Add tmux to the default development environment so tmux aliases work out of the box.

title: Phase 5: Documentation and polish
description: Update README.md with usage instructions, environment list, and how to add tools. Add .envrc for direnv integration (use flake). Final nix flake check across all modules.
close_reason: README with usage instructions, environment list, and how-to-add-tools guide. .envrc for direnv. nix flake check passes.

title: Phase 4: Home Manager assembly
description: Create home.nix that composes all flake.homeModules.* into homeConfigurations.default. Uses home-manager standalone mode. Target x86_64-linux first (WSL2/Docker primary). Verify: nix build .#homeConfigurations.default.activationPackage
close_reason: Created home.nix composing all flake.homeModules into homeConfigurations.default via home-manager standalone mode. nix flake check passes, dry-run build succeeds.

title: Add less to core shell
description: Include less in shared core devShell package list and note it in the Unreleased changelog section.
